summary:
The provided information does not include any studies evaluating tivantinib’s efficacy in MET-high hepatocellular carcinoma. Thus, its effectiveness remains unproven with current evidence. 

Final Answer: $\boxed{\text{No}}$

Tivantinib has not been evaluated in patients with MET-amplified hepatocellular carcinoma; all references pertain to hematologic cancers involving different targets such as BCR-ABL and EGFR. No clinical trial data supports its use or benefit specifically in this subset of liver cancer.
